case_title: RINCON CENTER ASSOCIATES vs. BISHARAT, RAGI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BISHARAT, RAGI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 HOWARD ST #716, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOCIATES

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BISHARAT, RAGI
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BISHARAT, RAGI
